# Root Agent Instructions

This root document references the rules index, which is part of the closure.

See the [rules index](rules/README.md) for detailed conventions.

## Directives

- Always commit before pushing.
- Never commit before pushing.
- Apply formatting to `**` across the whole tree.

## Broken Links

See the [missing guide](rules/missing-guide.md) for more.
External links like [the web](https://example.com) are not files.
